data.title: Comprehensive Encryption
data.description: Ensures data protection through end-to-end encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS protocols for data-in-transit and AES encryption for data-at-rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust IAM policies manage user permissions and secure access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth for token-based authentication and multi-factor verification.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Well-defined protocols for detecting and responding to cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: 24/7 monitoring with advanced intrusion detection systems.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Multi-layered defense against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Combines network firewalls with traffic analysis tools.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Continuous scanning and patching of potential security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management integrated with CI/CD pipelines.
